synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-20951 Oracle Linux 9 gdm, gnome-shell, and gsettings-desktop-schemas bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20951
description:
gsettings-desktop-schemas
[40.0-8]
- Add an option to disable showing password entry at login/lockscreen
  Resolves: RHEL-123140
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20951

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20951.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
gdm-40.1-38.0.1.el9_7.i686.rpm
gdm-40.1-38.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
gdm-devel-40.1-38.0.1.el9_7.i686.rpm
gdm-devel-40.1-38.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
gdm-pam-extensions-devel-40.1-38.0.1.el9_7.i686.rpm
gdm-pam-extensions-devel-40.1-38.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
gnome-shell-40.10-31.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
gsettings-desktop-schemas-40.0-8.el9_7.i686.rpm
gsettings-desktop-schemas-40.0-8.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
gsettings-desktop-schemas-devel-40.0-8.el9_7.i686.rpm
gsettings-desktop-schemas-devel-40.0-8.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
gdm-40.1-38.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
gdm-devel-40.1-38.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
gdm-pam-extensions-devel-40.1-38.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
gnome-shell-40.10-31.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
gsettings-desktop-schemas-40.0-8.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
gsettings-desktop-schemas-devel-40.0-8.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/gdm-40.1-38.0.1.el9_7.src.rpm
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/gnome-shell-40.10-31.el9_7.src.rpm
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/gsettings-desktop-schemas-40.0-8.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

gsettings-desktop-schemas
[40.0-8]
- Add an option to disable showing password entry at login/lockscreen
  Resolves: RHEL-123140
